metadata.description: Marketplace exposing glm-plugin-cc for Claude Code (GLM reviewer/rescue via 智谱 BigModel OpenAI-compatible HTTP).

plugins.name: glm
plugins.description: Use 智谱 GLM models from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks. Stateless HTTP via OpenAI-compatible endpoint. No Stop hook — orchestration lives in an external SEV harness's /verify layer.
